$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace; allowedBlocks swapped to artisanpack/button so the parent forces its own forked child.

TypeScript port. Adds explicit 'wp-block-buttons' class to useBlockProps. Swaps DEFAULT_BLOCK.name + template + allowedBlocks to 'artisanpack/button'. Drops the useSelect(blocksStore) hasButtonVariations branch — directInsert is forced true (we don't ship button variations yet).
TypeScript port; explicit 'wp-block-buttons' class added for renderer parity.
Both v1 (contentJustification/orientation → layout) and v2 (legacy align center/left/right) entries ported.

Upstream multi-block transforms preserved (now producing artisanpack/button children); the rich-text createElement+innerText flow is simplified to a regex extraction to avoid pulling in @wordpress/rich-text + the private getTransformedAttributes util. Added bidirectional block transforms for core/buttons ↔ artisanpack/buttons round-tripping.
Combined SCSS-to-CSS port. SCSS $blocks-block__margin variable inlined as 0.5em. data-type selectors rewritten.
Inline SVG (stacked pills) for the inserter.
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract. Upstream's PHP-side init wiring is not carried.

knownDivergences: block.json + edit.tsx force allowedBlocks/template/DEFAULT_BLOCK to 'artisanpack/button' instead of 'core/button' — the parent only accepts the forked child so the cluster ships as a coherent unit.
edit.tsx drops the upstream useSelect hasButtonVariations check and always sets directInsert=true. The fork doesn't register button variations yet.
transforms.ts simplifies the upstream paragraph→buttons transform (regex-based href/text extraction instead of @wordpress/rich-text + the private utils/get-transformed-attributes helper).
transforms.ts adds bidirectional block transforms (core/buttons ↔ artisanpack/buttons) that don't exist upstream — required for V2 coexistence.
index.ts replaces upstream's PHP-side init wiring with the visual-editor auto-discovery contract.
